rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a newborn elephant than a newborn human?
rounds.fact: A newborn human weighs ~3.5 kg; a newborn elephant weighs ~120 kg — 34× heavier. And elephant calves can walk within hours of birth.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a cruise ship than the Titanic?
rounds.fact: The Titanic was ~52,000 gross tonnes; the Wonder of the Seas (world's largest cruise ship) is ~236,000 GT — 4.5× heavier.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is Jupiter than all other planets combined?
rounds.fact: All planets except Jupiter combined weigh ~450 Earth masses; Jupiter alone weighs ~318 Earth masses — but Jupiter is still ~2.5× heavier than all others combined.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a neutron star than the Sun, despite being tiny?
rounds.fact: A neutron star typically has ~1.4 solar masses — squeezed into a sphere just 20 km wide. A teaspoon of its material would weigh ~1 billion tonnes.

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is an aircraft carrier than a Formula 1 car?
rounds.fact: An F1 car weighs 798 kg; the USS Gerald Ford aircraft carrier weighs ~100,000 tonnes — 125,000× heavier. It carries 90 aircraft and 5,000 crew.
